raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "CRYSTAL LAW 5 violation: leaderboards exist in BrandedBy despite being banned as zero-sum shame triggers", "recommended_fix": "Remove all user rankings; replace with Focus Rooms or collective milestones"}, {"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/agents/", "issue": "Infrastructure gap: 13 registered perspectives but directory is empty — no runnable agents, only prompts", "recommended_fix": "Implement Python agents in packages/swarm/agents/ to close activation gap"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/lessons.md", "issue": "Class 15-16 drift: v0Laura vision and 'improve every turn' directive repeatedly forgotten on wake", "recommended_fix": "Enforce wake-time loading of vision and self-review gate before any output"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "CRYSTAL LAW 5 and LAW 3 violations actively harm user psychology at scale"}

findings.issue: CRYSTAL LAW 5 violation: leaderboards exist in BrandedBy despite being banned as zero-sum shame triggers
findings.recommended_fix: Remove all user rankings; replace with Focus Rooms or collective milestones

findings.issue: Infrastructure gap: 13 registered perspectives but directory is empty — no runnable agents, only prompts
findings.recommended_fix: Implement Python agents in packages/swarm/agents/ to close activation gap

findings.issue: Class 15-16 drift: v0Laura vision and 'improve every turn' directive repeatedly forgotten on wake
findings.recommended_fix: Enforce wake-time loading of vision and self-review gate before any output

whistleblower_flag: CRYSTAL LAW 5 and LAW 3 violations actively harm user psychology at scale
